Remove a user from a group

GAM.command: gam user <User Email Address> vacation on subject "<Subject Line Text>" message "<Message In The Email Body>" html start 2000-01-01 end 2999-01-01
gam user <File Owner Email> add drivefileacl <File ID> user <New Editor Email> role editor
gam create user <email> firstname <first> lastname <last> password <password>

GAM.description: Users › Force password change on next login
Users › Sign out from all devices

GAM.command: gam user <email> delete messages query "<search_query>" doit
gam user <email> vacation on subject "<subject>" message "<message>"
gam user <email> add calendars <calendar_id> selected true

Admin › Revoke admin role from user

gam user <email> update user changepassword false

GAM.command: gam ou_and_children <org_unit> print users fields primaryemail,name,suspended

gam user <email> update user gal on
